title: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup
summary: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we’re partnering with Stripe to find the country’s most exciting early-stage startups. Stripe doesn’t just sponsor Startup Battlefield — the company is also deeply embedded in the startup ecosystem.
